It is particularly ideal for polishing chrome. However, it also restores the luster of stainless steel, aluminum, copper, silver, and plastic. Menzerna Metal Polish is ideal when it comes to achieving a high-gloss finish for automotive accessories, household items, jewelry, and musical instruments. Quickly and easily removes deposits, tarnishes, and signs of use. Accessories ### Processing - **By hand: ** In circular motions ### Volumes | 125g | 23003.391.001 ### Optimised for [ ![image](data:,) Standard Microfiber Cloth ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/standard-microfiber-cloth) [ ![image](data:,) Premium Microfiber Cloth ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/premium-microfiber-cloth) [ ![image](data:,) Crater Shaped Lambswool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/crater-shaped-lambswool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Double Sided Lambswool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/double-sided-lambswool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Orbital Wool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/orbital-wool-pad) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/0/4/csm_menzerna_Autopolitur_1100x1100_metal_Polish_88c6a1e771.jpg) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Zubehoer/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_Autopolitur_1100x1100_metal_Polish.jpg) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Zubehoer/Produktbilder/Polierwerkzeug/Produkte_freigestellt/menzerna_MetalPolish.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Zubehoer/Produktbilder/Polierwerkzeug/Produkte_freigestellt/menzerna_MetalPolish.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/0/4/csm_menzerna_Autopolitur_1100x1100_metal_Polish_88cbd5ec92.jpg) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/0/a/csm_menzerna_MetalPolish_b2af3b32c4.png) [ ](javascript:;) [Find this product at your local dealer](/service/dealer-search) [![image](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/23003.391.001/rotation01.jpg)](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/23003.391.001/rotation01.jpg) ## More information - [Benefits](javascript:;) - [Recommended usage](javascript:;) - [Process Example](javascript:;) Benefits - Easy to use - Economical - Reliable results - Versatile range of applications at work, at home, and in leisure activities - Silicone-free Recommended usage - Metal Polish is used to clean and polish all metallic surfaces. - Clean the surface in question with Menzerna Control Cleaner. - Apply Metal Polish to a microfiber cloth or polishing pad and polish with circular motions. - Remove any residue with a clean, soft microfiber cloth. Process Example ![image](data:,) ## Downloads - [ Technical Datasheet Metal Polish 145.65 KB ](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Zubehoer/EN/TDB_Metal_Polish_EN_09.2021.pdf) ![image](data:,) /fileadmin/user_upload/MP.jpg Metal Polish

Menzerna Metal Polish is certified under code A7 of the NSF (National Sanitation Foundation). NSF is a global leader in the area of product certification for food safety, with a focus on food, water, ambient air, and the environment. NSF carries out product tests and material analysis, as well as unannounced on-site visits. Every single aspect in the development of a product is evaluated thoroughly before it is eligible for certification.

Load video FAQ ## Questions & answers Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers. [To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs) [How do I polish metal by hand?](javascript:;) Metal can be polished quickly and easily with [Menzerna Metal Polish](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/metal-polish) and a [microfiber cloth](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/standard-microfiber-cloth). Polish the metal surface with circular movements. [Learn more here.](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/metal-polish) [How do I polish metal?](javascript:;) Metal can be polished by hand or with a polishing machine. With Menzerna [metal polish](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/metal-polish), you can make all of your metal surfaces shiny and new again. [Where can I buy Menzerna polishes?](javascript:;) Menzerna’s premium polishes are available both at local dealers and online in car care shops. You can quickly find the right contact person for you with our [dealer search](/service/dealer-search). Always up to date ## Register for the newsletter now! Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing. [To the newsletter](/service/newsletter) ## Metal Polish Menzerna Metal Polish is certified under code A7 of the NSF (National Sanitation Foundation). NSF is a global leader in the area of product certification for food safety, with a focus on food, water, ambient air, and the environment. NSF carries out product tests and material analysis, as well as unannounced on-site visits. Every single aspect in the development of a product is evaluated thoroughly before it is eligible for certification. ![image](/typo3conf/ext/pp_products/Resources/Public/images/loader-spinner.svg)
